summary: First-pass smoke testing of Mahi's portfolio. Backend /api/ smoke check returns Hello World. Full frontend coverage: hero (incl. particle canvas), CTAs scroll behavior, navbar links, all sections (About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Achievements, Contact, Footer), animated stats settle to correct values (9.32, 95, 87, 3), project filters (All/GenAI/MLOps/Analytics) filter exactly to expected cards, theme toggle adds/removes 'dark' class, mobile menu opens with nav links. 54/54 UI checks passed.
passed: Loader fades within ~2s; site loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
Hero: name, title, tagline 'From Numbers to Narratives', intro, particle canvas, all 3 social hrefs
Hero CTA 'View Projects' smooth-scrolls projects section into view
Navbar fixed; clicking nav-link-about scrolls about section into view
Theme toggle toggles html.dark class (light->dark->light verified)
About: 3 paragraphs, 4 animated counters settle to 9.32, 95, 87, 3
Projects shows 3 cards; GenAI filter -> pharmacortex only; MLOps -> aws-mlops only; Analytics -> inter-stock only; All -> 3 cards
Skills: 4 groups with python/machine-learning/aws badges present
Achievements: 2 cards + certifications-block + leadership-card with 'Operations Manager' & 'NLC Bharat'
Footer text exactly 'Designed and Developed by Mahi Soni'
Mobile (390x844): nav toggle opens mobile-nav-menu with mobile-nav-link-about
notes: Resume buttons link to '#' as placeholder (expected per problem statement). Social links go to placeholder URLs (not visited). Headshot is intentional initials placeholder.
